hypotheses_tested.summary: Project only the terminal-y half of the splitbookend chain onto the incumbent entry-relay backbone. Goal: keep the runner-up median benefit while avoiding the corridor-side mean/max tax.
Micro-hybridize entry relay with reduced splitbookend bookends. Goal: test whether one or both bookends can preserve median compression after partial dose-down.
Retune the incumbent l9 y-gate slightly downward while keeping the l8 entry conditioner and the unified core intact. Goal: improve mean/max without abandoning the incumbent basin.

Allow xboundary to contribute exactly one compatibility probe by pairing it with the same terminal micro-closure. Goal: see whether xboundary adds anything once a stronger terminal lever is already present.

rows_sorted.rationale: Pure terminal micro-closure on top of the incumbent entry-relay backbone: keep the entry conditioner and incumbent core untouched, add only a tiny anchor12 y return pair.
Local incumbent ridge-refine: keep l8 x=+1 and the unified core, only soften the l9 y gate from 1.0 s to 0.75 s.
Symmetric half-dose splitbookend hybrid around the incumbent entry-relay backbone.
Single admissible xboundary compatibility probe: xboundary pos1 plus the same terminal micro-closure used by H1.
Keep the full corridor conditioner, but soften the terminal y closure to half-dose.
Keep the full terminal y closure, but soften the corridor conditioner to half-dose.
Corridor-only projection of splitbookend onto the incumbent entry-relay backbone.

best_candidate.rationale: Pure terminal micro-closure on top of the incumbent entry-relay backbone: keep the entry conditioner and incumbent core untouched, add only a tiny anchor12 y return pair.

second_competitive_candidate.rationale: Local incumbent ridge-refine: keep l8 x=+1 and the unified core, only soften the l9 y gate from 1.0 s to 0.75 s.

bottom_line.statement: Frontier refinement succeeded: both a terminal-only micro projection and a local l9 ridge refine beat the old corrected incumbent, and the terminal micro projection is the new corrected leader.
